seoTitle: Kingston Beach vs Koonya — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Kingston Beach vs Koonya: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kingston Beach and Koonya.
heading: Kingston Beach vs Koonya — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kingston Beach, Tasmania and Koonya, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Koonya has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Kingston Beach (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kingston Beach or Koonya safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kingston Beach has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Koonya scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kingston Beach scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Koonya scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kingston Beach or Koonya?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Koonya has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
